mapper.sql: id, project_id, name, description, user_edited_description, gender, role, seed_image_url, seed_prompt, seed_status, is_confirmed, created_at, updated_at
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO character ( project_id, name, description, user_edited_description, gender, role, seed_image_url, seed_prompt, seed_status, is_confirmed, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{projectId}, #{name}, #{description}, #{userEditedDescription}, #{gender}, #{role}, #{seedImageUrl}, #{seedPrompt}, #{seedStatus}, #{isConfirmed}, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.select: SELECT FROM character WHERE project_id = #{projectId} ORDER BY created_at ASC
mapper.update:
UPDATE character SET is_confirmed = #{isConfirmed}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id IN
#{id}
